title: TeamPCP Supply Chain Campaign: Update 005 - First Confirmed Victim Disclosure, P

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - TeamPCP Supply Chain Campaign: Update 005 - First Confirmed 
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/04/03
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:

            - '*crates.io*'
            - '*isc.sans.edu*'
            - '*sans.org*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
